ar.notice.mobile.title: Mobile Notice
ar.notice.mobile.body: This site works on mobile and touch screens, but things may look out of place or be hard to read. Please check us out on a laptop or desktop with a mouse or trackpad.

en_GB.notice.mobile.title: Mobile Notice!
en_GB.notice.mobile.body: This website works on mobile and touch screens, but things may look out of place or be hard to read. Please visit us out on a laptop or desktop with a mouse or trackpad.

en_US.notice.mobile.title: Mobile Notice!
en_US.notice.mobile.body: This site works on mobile and touch screens, but things may look out of place or be hard to read. Please check us out on a laptop or desktop with a mouse or trackpad.

ja_JP.notice.mobile.title: モバイル通知！
ja_JP.notice.mobile.body: このサイトはモバイルやタッチスクリーンでも動作しますが、レイアウトが崩れたり読みにくくなったりする場合があります。マウスやトラックパッドを備えたノートパソコンやデスクトップでご覧いただくことをお勧めします。

ro_RO.notice.mobile.title: Atenție!
ro_RO.notice.mobile.body: Acest site funcționează pe mobile și display-uri cu touch, dar unele lucruri vor arăta ciudat sau vor fi greu de înțeles. Vă rugăm să ne accesați de pe un laptop sau PC, folosind un mouse sau trackpad.
